title: Rich Crispy Turkish Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and adventurous Turkish dish featuring lamb, tamarind, and a crispy exterior, made egg-free-friendly and cooked to perfection using sous-vide techniques. This recipe combines rich and exotic flavors for a unique culinary experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, cumin, salt, black pepper, and sumac.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Seal the lamb cubes in a sous-vide bag and cook for 2 hours.
After 2 hours, remove the lamb from the sous-vide bag and thread onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Heat a large skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil.
Sear the lamb kebabs for 2-3 minutes per side, or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the lamb kebabs hot with tamarind balls and your choice of sides, such as rice or roasted vegetables.
